mapper.select:
SELECT HOR.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOR.Member_id AS memberId, HOR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, HOR.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, HOR.DOCUMENT_Url AS documentUrl, HOR.STATUS AS status, HOR.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, HOR.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, HOR.PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, M.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, H.NAME AS hospitalName FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST HOR JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON HOR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID JOIN HOSPITAL H ON HOR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID ORDER BY
M.NICKNAME
H.NAME
HOR.STATUS
HOR.REJECT_REASON
HOR.CREATED_AT
HOR.PROCESSED_AT
HOR.REQUEST_ID
ASC
DESC
NULLS LAST
, HOR.REQUEST_ID DESC

SELECT HOR.REQUEST_ID AS requestId, HOR.Member_id AS memberId, HOR.HOSPITAL_ID AS hospitalId, HOR.BUSINESS_NUMBER AS businessNumber, HOR.DOCUMENT_Url AS documentUrl, HOR.STATUS AS status, HOR.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason, HOR.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, HOR.PROCESSED_AT AS processedAt, M.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, M.NICKNAME AS nickname, H.NAME AS hospitalName FROM HOSPITAL_OWNER_REQUEST HOR JOIN APP_MEMBER M ON HOR.MEMBER_ID = M.MEMBER_ID JOIN HOSPITAL H ON HOR.HOSPITAL_ID = H.HOSPITAL_ID WHERE HOR.REQUEST_ID = #{requestId}
